title: Columns
description: A source-ordered responsive column recipe for bounded Markdown regions.
limitations: The proposed directive is not executable in Batch 6.

gap.reason: The strict region syntax, renderer and authoring validation are not yet admitted.
gap.fallback: Keep regions as source-ordered Markdown sections that stack naturally on every viewport.
gap.admission_condition: Accept a bounded two-to-four-region syntax with renderer, negative tests, documentation and responsive browser evidence.
